name: Intercom
description: Manage contacts, messages, and conversations in Intercom
author: awaitstep

contactId.label: Contact ID
contactId.description: Contact ID. Used by: Get Contact.

conversationId.label: Conversation ID
conversationId.description: Conversation ID. Used by: List Conversations, Reply to Conversation.

email.label: Email
email.description: Contact email. Used by: Create Contact.

name.label: Name
name.description: Contact name. Used by: Create Contact.

role.label: Role
role.description: Contact role. Used by: Create Contact.

messageType.label: Message Type
messageType.description: Message type. Used by: Send Message.

subject.label: Subject
subject.description: Message subject. Used by: Send Message.

body.label: Body
body.description: Message or reply body. Used by: Send Message, Reply to Conversation.

adminId.label: Admin ID
adminId.description: Admin ID. Required for: Send Message, Reply to Conversation.
